# doc_coverage baseline -- grandfathered docstring gaps.
# Generated by `python3 scripts/doc_coverage.py --write-baseline`.
# Each line: <relative-path>\t<gap-key>.
# Gap-key: 'module' or 'function:<qualified-name>'.
# Remove entries as future passes close gaps; CI fails on any NEW gap.
